purpose: Enable bidirectional communication between concurrent agent lanes

session_start: Check for active sessions on target lanes
If mode == governing: Acquire lock file in own lane
Register session in registry with mode
If mode == governing: Begin heartbeat (60s interval)
session_end: If mode == governing: Release lock file
If mode == governing: Write session handoff document
If mode == observer: No handoff required

governing.description: Primary agent with write access and heartbeat requirement

observer.description: Read-only test session, no heartbeat enforcement
